F.41. 5120(3), qeTa 03 7Fq@y, 2018 # fawfertaa T FTe AT g, A9 - T AT H AT 11 F S, 2019 T v vty F o erez, @ T avew F T 0% 30 @, 2019 7 fT erafer F forn” o1z, s e 91T 7 ST [T, F7-18011/13/2000-Ffru(wre)] Frarer g firg, dor wfea feoqur ;e wfem=AT, AT F TS, SETEO § HeAT w1 93(3), AT 03 wHgEY, 2018 F Ewr TR g% AT S qeveAn AfSEr §=A A 1651(3), G 25 F9, 2019 F FT qATAT o T =m 3609 GI/2019 (03] -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART I—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE ORDER New Delhi, the 15th July, 2019 S.0. 2522(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.0. 5120(E), dated the 3rd October, 2018, namely:- In the said notification, in paragraph 11, for the words, figures and letters “for a period up to June, 2019”, the words, figures and letters “for a period up to 30th August, 2019 shall be substituted. [F. No. Q-18011/13/2000-CPA (Pt.)] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.0. 93 (E), dated 3rd October, 2018 and subsequently amended vide number S.0 1651 (E), dated the 25th April, 2019.
